case_title: TARGET NATIONAL BANK VS. GWENDOLYN BRANDON et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 15, INCL.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT BRANDON, GWENDOLYN DOES 1 THRU 15, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-14-2009
DECLARATION RE: WAIVER OF INTEREST & ATTORNEY'S FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK
